diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,127 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point that extends HonoBase with default router configuration using SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, Env, Schema, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono implementation with routing, request handling, and middleware composition
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, Hono, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Context, Router, compose, Request, Response, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, mount, fetch, request, fire, #dispatch, #addRoute, #handleError
+- Simple note: Implements chainable method registration and request dispatching with router integration
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router using regex compilation from path patterns
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, add, match, RegExpRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, splitPath
+- Simple note: Converts path parameters with wildcards into compiled regular expressions
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router implementation
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear sequential path matching with star and label parameter support
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Route, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPath, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, splitByStarRe, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes
+- Simple note: Linear search through routes with character-by-character path matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for RegExpRouter with PreparedRegExpRouter support
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Provides serializable router for deployment with pre-built matchers
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Two-phase router with trie for structure and regex for matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, match, PATH_ERROR, Trie, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware, clearWildcardRegExpCache
+- Simple note: Builds optimized regex patterns from trie structure during add phase
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and routing match operation
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, Result, Router, match, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Provides match function that uses pre-built regex matchers
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization and reuse
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, match, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, RelocateMap, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RegExpRouter, clearWildcardRegExpCache, PATH_ERROR
+- Simple note: Prepares matchers for deployment and converts to string for portability
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie implementation using nested node structure
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr
+- Simple note: Builds tree structure with label and wildcard patterns for optimization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class for building regular expressions from path structure
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, ReplacementMap, buildRegExp, insert
+- Simple note: Converts path tokens into nested Node structure and builds regex
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router implementation
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Selects optimal sub-router from available routers dynamically
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, add, match, activeRouter
+- Simple note: Wraps other routers and determines which one to use based on route registration
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module entry point for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router implementation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with node tree for path matching
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, search, match
+- Simple note: Uses tree structure for O(1) path lookup without regex compilation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with pattern matching and parameter extraction
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerParamsSet, HandlerSet, MethodSet, Params, emptyParams, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, getPattern, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern
+- Simple note: Each node stores methods, children, patterns, and accumulated params
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test cases for router implementations
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, Params, ParamIndexMap, Router, runTest, match, expect, describe, it
+- Simple note: Contains common test suite hierarchy for testing router behavior
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter only
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach
+- Simple note: Validates regex-based pattern matching with skip for unsupported cases
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter only
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach
+- Simple note: Validates linear path matching without regex support
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter only
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, ParamStash, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, throw
+- Simple note: Validates two-phase router with optimized regex patterns
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, new
+- Simple note: Validates adapter router delegating to RegExpRouter + TrieRouter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter only
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, new
+- Simple note: Validates pure trie tree routing with node tree search
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie Node matching logic
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect, insert, search, beforeEach, new, const
+- Simple note: Tests individual node search behavior with various path patterns
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md with specific content about routing files. First, I should check if the bench-artifacts directory exists and create it if needed, then read all the specified files, and finally write the ledger document.

Let me start by checking if the bench-artifacts directory exists.
